shared_directive_text: You are a game design expert. Follow the task exactly. Output ONLY what is asked — no questions, no meta-commentary, no requests for clarification. Start your response immediately with the requested content.

agents.name: gemini-mechanics
agents.task: List exactly 3 core mechanics for a roguelike card game. Format: numbered list (1. 2. 3.). Each item: mechanic name — one sentence description. Nothing else.

agents.name: codex-content
agents.task: List exactly 3 card types for a roguelike card game. Format: numbered list (1. 2. 3.). Each item: card type name — one sentence description. Nothing else.

agents.name: claude-synthesis
agents.task: Read the files gemini-mechanics.last.txt and codex-content.last.txt in subagent-runs/mixed/test-3way-game-design/. Synthesize both outputs into a single coherent game concept paragraph (3-5 sentences in Korean). Start with the game title. End with verdict: ACCEPTED if both inputs were usable, MATERIAL_ISSUES if either was empty or off-topic.
